sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּת

Transliteration: sûth

Phonetic: sooth

BDB Definition:

  1. to incite, allure, instigate, entice
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to incite (to a request)
      2. to allure, lure
      3. to instigate (bad sense)

Origin: perhaps denominative from H7898

TWOT entry: 1481

Part(s) of speech: Verb
